label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's figure out when Richard could have gone to the bakery. The bakery is closed after 7pm, so he has to go before that. First, let's list out all the times Richard was seen doing other things. - Richard woke up at 8am. So he's awake starting at 8am. - From 9am to 2pm, Betty saw him at the library reading. That's a solid block of time he was at the library. - Then David saw him at the electronic store from 2pm to 4pm, fixing a computer. So that's another block, right after the library. - Mary saw him taking photos near the Eiffel Tower from 4pm to 5pm. So after the electronic store,
